# Inyeon AI

> Inyeon AI is a free AI-powered intentional dating app inspired by the Korean philosophy of inyeon — the invisible thread connecting two people before they ever meet. Available globally on Android, it matches people through mood, personality, and genuine intent — not photos or swipes. All chats are encrypted and stored locally on the user's device. Data is never sold.

## Core Features
- AI matching based on Big Five personality, love languages, and attachment style
- Mood and moment-based matching — match with someone in the same headspace right now
- Privacy-first: chats stored locally on device, encrypted, never read or sold by Inyeon AI
- Full message control: delete for everyone and edit sent messages
- Incognito mode and granular privacy controls
- Seven-day match window to encourage intentional connection
- Free in-app psychology tests: Big Five, love languages, attachment style
- Available free on Android globally; iOS coming soon
